route-install-bgp.display_name: BGP learned route installation to ASIC
route-install-bgp.trigger: BGP session receives UPDATE with new prefix

route-install-static.trigger: User configures a static route via config CLI

port-config.trigger: User changes port speed, MTU, or admin state

vlan-create.trigger: User creates a VLAN and adds member ports

lag-create.trigger: User creates a PortChannel and adds member ports

route-withdraw.trigger: BGP UPDATE withdraws a prefix or the session goes down

arp-resolution.trigger: Traffic to an unresolved next-hop triggers kernel ARP resolution

fdb-learn.trigger: ASIC hardware learns a source MAC on a port

vxlan-vtep-create.trigger: User configures a VXLAN tunnel (VTEP source IP)

acl-program.trigger: User configures an ACL table and rules

config-flow.trigger: Any configuration change: SONiC CLI, config reload, or direct CONFIG_DB write
